title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude model was used to visualize the cognitive and decision-making patterns of Williams F1 drivers and their teams during racing. The visualizations were then integrated into physical designs on helmets and race suits as part of the "Pattern of Thought" project debuting at Monaco.
